questionHtml: Demonstrate that your answer to (b)(i) is consistent with the effect of an increase in temperature on the percentage yield, as shown in the graph.
markschemeHtml:
increased temperature decreases yield «as shown on graph» ✔

shifts equilibrium in endothermic/reverse direction ✔
